meaning: (linguistics) part of speech; word class; lexical category
sentence: 老师让我们区分汉语的词类。
pinyin: Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen qūfēn Hànyǔ de cí lèi.
english: The teacher asked us to distinguish the parts of speech in Chinese.

meaning: (athletics) to take off (at the start of a jump); (of price, salary et
sentence: 这款手机价格从两千元起跳。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī jiàgé cóng liǎng qiān yuán qǐ tiào.
english: This smartphone starts at two thousand yuan.

sentence: 这件青铜器上的金文保存得很完整。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn qīng tóng qì shàng de jīn wén bǎo cún de hěn wán zhěng.
english: The bronze inscription on this artifact is very well preserved.

meaning: to hand over (responsibility for sth) to (sb); to leave it to (sb else
sentence: 这件事就交由你来负责吧。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì jiù jiāo yóu nǐ lái fù zé ba.
english: Let's leave this matter for you to take charge of.

sentence: 上课铃声一响，同学们都坐好了。
pinyin: Shàngkè língshēng yī xiǎng, tóngxuémen dōu zuò hǎo le.
english: As soon as the class bell rang, all the students sat down.

sentence: 他鼓动大家一起去爬山。
pinyin: Tā gǔ dòng dà jiā yī qǐ qù pá shān.
english: He encouraged everyone to go hiking together.

meaning: 1. direct observation; 2. directly perceived through the senses; 3. in
sentence: 这张图表比文字更直观。
pinyin: Zhè zhāng túbiǎo bǐ wénzì gèng zhíguān.
english: This chart is more intuitive than plain text.

sentence: 人工智能正在改变我们的生活方式。
pinyin: Rén gōng zhì néng zhèngzài gǎibiàn wǒmen de shēnghuó fāngshì.
english: Artificial intelligence is changing the way we live.

meaning: 1. top scorer in the palace examination (highest rank of the Imperial
sentence: 他考了全省第一，是今年的高考状元。
pinyin: Tā kǎo le quán shěng dì yī, shì jīnnián de gāokǎo zhuàngyuan.
english: He scored first in the whole province — the top scorer in this year's college entrance exam.

sentence: 这座核电站为周边城市提供了大量电力。
pinyin: Zhè zuò hé diàn zhàn wèi zhōu biān chéng shì tí gōng le dà liàng diàn lì.
english: This nuclear power plant supplies a large amount of electricity to the surrounding cities.

sentence: 昨晚发生了一起特大交通事故。
pinyin: Zuó wǎn fāshēng le yī qǐ tèdà jiāotōng shìgù.
english: An exceptionally serious traffic accident occurred last night.

sentence: 她最爱吃芒果口味的冰淇淋。
pinyin: Tā zuì ài chī mángguǒ kǒuwèi de bīngqílín.
english: She loves mango-flavored ice cream the most.

sentence: 记得定期给手机数据做备份。
pinyin: Jìde dìngqī gěi shǒujī shùjù zuò bèifèn.
english: Remember to regularly back up your phone data.

meaning: 1. to traffic narcotics; 2. drugs trade; 3. opium trade
sentence: 他因贩毒被判了十年。
pinyin: Tā yīn fàndú bèi pànle shí nián.
english: He was sentenced to ten years for drug trafficking.

sentence: 这首曲子是著名作曲家写的。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu qǔzi shì zhùmíng zuòqǔjiā xiě de.
english: This piece was written by a famous composer.

sentence: 他出版了第一本诗集。
pinyin: Tā chūbǎnle dì yī běn shījí.
english: He published his first poetry anthology.

meaning: 1. to rain curses (on sb); 2. to let sb have it; 3. to bawl sb out
sentence: 他因迟到被老板大骂了一顿。
pinyin: Tā yīn chídào bèi lǎobǎn dàmàle yī dùn.
english: He got a thorough scolding from the boss for being late.

sentence: 负数的绝对值是正数。
pinyin: Fùshù de juéduìzhí shì zhèngshù.
english: The absolute value of a negative number is a positive number.

sentence: 他愤怒地骂她是荡妇。
pinyin: Tā fènnù de mà tā shì dàngfù.
english: He angrily called her a slut.

sentence: 她希望通过工作达到自我实现。
pinyin: Tā xīwàng tōngguò gōngzuò dádào zìwǒ shíxiàn.
english: She hopes to achieve self-actualization through her work.

meaning: 1. IOU; 2. informal document acknowledging a debt
sentence: 他打了张白条说下个月还钱。
pinyin: Tā dǎ le zhāng báitiáo shuō xià gè yuè huán qián.
english: He wrote an IOU saying he'd pay back next month.

sentence: 两条直线互相正交时角度为九十度。
pinyin: Liǎng tiáo zhíxiàn hùxiāng zhèngjiāo shí jiǎodù wéi jiǔshí dù.
english: When two lines are orthogonal to each other, the angle is ninety degrees.

meaning: The Council of State; National affairs
sentence: 他负责处理国务方面的事务。
pinyin: Tā fùzé chǔlǐ guówù fāngmiàn de shìwù.
english: He is responsible for handling affairs of state.

sentence: 我们周末去戏院看了一场京剧。
pinyin: Wǒmen zhōumò qù xìyuàn kàn le yī chǎng jīngjù.
english: We went to the theater to watch a Peking opera on the weekend.

sentence: 他的行为败坏了公司名声。
pinyin: Tā de xíngwéi bàihuài le gōngsī míngshēng.
english: His behavior ruined the company's reputation.

sentence: 她每周换一次床单。
pinyin: Tā měi zhōu huàn yī cì chuángdān.
english: She changes her bed sheets once a week.

sentence: 教皇每年都会向全球信徒发表祝词。
pinyin: Jiàohuáng měi nián dōu huì xiàng quánqiú xìntú fābiǎo zhùcí.
english: The pope delivers a blessing to believers worldwide every year.

sentence: 他家新装了一条宽带网络。
pinyin: Tā jiā xīn zhuāng le yī tiáo kuāndài wǎngluò.
english: His family just got a new broadband internet connection.

meaning: 1. also written 機槍|机枪; 2. machine gun
sentence: 士兵架起机关枪守住了阵地。
pinyin: Shìbīng jiàqǐ jīguānqiāng shǒuzhù le zhèndì.
english: The soldiers set up a machine gun to hold their position.

sentence: 保守派反对这项新政策。
pinyin: Bǎoshǒupài fǎnduì zhè xiàng xīn zhèngcè.
english: The conservative faction opposed this new policy.

sentence: 他是公司里的中层管理人员。
pinyin: Tā shì gōngsī lǐ de zhōngcéng guǎnlǐ rényuán.
english: He is middle management at the company.

meaning: 1. to do as one sees fit; 2. to play it by ear (according to the circu
sentence: 这件事你自己看着办吧。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì nǐ zìjǐ kànzheàn bā.
english: Handle this matter however you see fit.

sentence: 在这种情境下，保持冷静最重要。
pinyin: Zài zhè zhǒng qíngjìng xià, bǎochí lěngjìng zuì zhòngyào.
english: In this kind of situation, staying calm is most important.

sentence: 这款双面外套正反都可以穿，很实用。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shuāngmiàn wàitào zhèngfǎn dōu kěyǐ chuān, hěn shíyòng.
english: This reversible coat can be worn on either side, making it very practical.

sentence: 他屡屡迟到，被经理批评了。
pinyin: Tā lǚlǚ chídào, bèi jīnglǐ pīpíng le.
english: He was repeatedly late and was criticized by the manager.

sentence: 公交车总站就在火车站旁边。
pinyin: Gōngjiāo chē zǒngzhàn jiù zài huǒchēzhàn pángbiān.
english: The bus terminus is right next to the train station.

meaning: 1. constant (math.); 2. quota; 3. fixed number (e.g. of places on a bu
sentence: 班级人数有定数，不能随意增加。
pinyin: Bānjí rénshù yǒu dìngshù, bù néng suíyì zēngjiā.
english: The class has a fixed quota and cannot be arbitrarily increased.

meaning: 1. helpful; 2. beneficial; 3. to help; 4. conducive to
sentence: 多喝水有助于保持健康。
pinyin: Duō hē shuǐ yǒuzhù yú bǎochí jiànkāng.
english: Drinking more water is conducive to staying healthy.

meaning: to practice diligently; to act energetically
sentence: 他一直力行节约，从不浪费食物。
pinyin: Tā yī zhí lì xíng jié yuē, cóng bù làng fèi shí wù.
english: He has always diligently practiced frugality and never wastes food.

sentence: 家里的插座一般用的是单相电。
pinyin: Jiā lǐ de chā zuò yī bān yòng de shì dān xiāng diàn.
english: The outlets at home generally use single-phase electricity.

meaning: without a license; without a permit
sentence: 警察取缔了几家无照经营的小摊。
pinyin: Jǐng chá qǔ dì le jǐ jiā wú zhào jīng yíng de xiǎo tān.
english: The police shut down several unlicensed street stalls.

meaning: (old) actress; adult film actress; AV actress
sentence: “女优”这个词如今多指成人电影演员。
pinyin: “Nǚyōu” zhège cí rújīn duō zhǐ chéngrén diànyǐng yǎnyuán.
english: The term 女优 nowadays mostly refers to adult-film actresses.

meaning: to tag along (with sb); (in combination with 與|与[yu3] or 和[he2]) to ac
sentence: 两人多年来形影相随，感情很深。
pinyin: Liǎng rén duō nián lái xíng yǐng xiāng suí, gǎn qíng hěn shēn.
english: The two have been inseparable for many years and share a deep bond.

sentence: 他靠网赚贴补家用，每月有几百元收入。
pinyin: Tā kào wǎng zhuàn tiē bǔ jiā yòng, měi yuè yǒu jǐ bǎi yuán shōu rù.
english: He supplements the household income by making money online, earning a few hundred yuan each month.

sentence: 她在政坛活跃了将近二十年。
pinyin: Tā zài zhèng tán huó yuè le jiāng jìn èr shí nián.
english: She has been active in political circles for nearly twenty years.

meaning: 1. to reform and open to the outside world; 2. refers to Deng Xiaoping
sentence: 改革开放让中国经济快速发展。
pinyin: Gǎigé kāifàng ràng Zhōngguó jīngjì kuàisù fāzhǎn.
english: Reform and opening up enabled China's economy to develop rapidly.

sentence: 从微观角度看，这个问题更复杂。
pinyin: Cóng wēiguān jiǎodù kàn, zhège wèntí gèng fùzá.
english: Looked at from a micro perspective, this issue is even more complex.

sentence: 长期姿势不好会导致脊椎畸形。
pinyin: Chángqī zīshì bù hǎo huì dǎozhì jǐzhuī jīxíng.
english: Poor posture over a long period can lead to spinal deformity.

meaning: 1. air crash; 2. aviation accident or incident
sentence: 那次空难造成了重大人员伤亡。
pinyin: Nà cì kōngnàn zàochéng le zhòngdà rényuán shāngwáng.
english: That air crash caused major casualties.

sentence: 他先道歉，继而送上了一束花。
pinyin: Tā xiān dào qiàn, jì ér sòng shàng le yī shù huā.
english: He first apologized, and then presented a bouquet of flowers.
